---
name: orchestration
description: Coordinate multiple agents for complex WYSIWYG editor features, managing workflows, dependencies, and integrations.
user-invocable: true
metadata:
  taxonomy: architecture/coordination/multi-agent/orchestration
---

## Guardrails

- Multi-agent coordination applies to delivery workflow, not runtime folder taxonomy.
- Runtime code should remain in product modules and feature folders.
- Orchestration outcomes must include verification that no dead code remains after refactors.
